lemmas.conclusion: count n xs ≤ count n (xs ++ ys)
lemmas.statement: count n xs ≤ count n (xs ++ ys)

lemmas.body: count n (x :: xs) ≤ count n (x :: (xs ++ ys))
lemmas.conclusion: count n (x :: xs) ≤ count n (x :: xs ++ ys)
lemmas.statement: (n : ℕ) (ys : List ℕ) (x : ℕ) (xs : List ℕ) (h1 : count n (x :: xs) ≤ count n (x :: (xs ++ ys))) : count n (x :: xs) ≤ count n (x :: xs ++ ys)

lemmas.body: (if n = x then count n xs + 1 else count n xs) ≤ if n = x then count n (xs ++ ys) + 1 else count n (xs ++ ys)
lemmas.conclusion: count n (x :: xs) ≤ count n (x :: (xs ++ ys))
lemmas.statement: (h1 : (if n = x then count n xs + 1 else count n xs) ≤ if n = x then count n (xs ++ ys) + 1 else count n (xs ++ ys)) : count n (x :: xs) ≤ count n (x :: (xs ++ ys))

lemmas.body: (if n = x then count n xs + 1 else count n xs) ≤ if n = x then count n (xs ++ ys) + 1 else count n (xs ++ ys)
lemmas.conclusion: count n (x :: xs) ≤ count n (x :: xs ++ ys)
lemmas.statement: (n : ℕ) (ys : List ℕ) (x : ℕ) (xs : List ℕ) (h1 : (if n = x then count n xs + 1 else count n xs) ≤ if n = x then count n (xs ++ ys) + 1 else count n (xs ++ ys)) : count n (x :: xs) ≤ count n (x :: xs ++ ys)

premises: ih : count n xs ≤ count n (xs ++ ys)
